platforms.short_bio:
The Earnalism
A quiet digital reading room.
Begin with Dracula by Bram Stoker.
Bengali Gothic is coming.
Read beautifully.
platforms.long_about_description: The Earnalism is a quiet digital reading room beginning with Dracula by Bram Stoker. Bengali Gothic is moving through a rights-safe pipeline. Read Chapter 1 free, then return whenever the book calls.
platforms.pinned_post_copy: Begin with Dracula. Chapter 1 is free. The Earnalism opens as a quiet digital reading room, with Bengali Gothic moving carefully through a rights-safe pipeline.
platforms.first_post_copy: The first lamp is lit. Begin with Dracula by Bram Stoker, read Chapter 1 free, and return to the reading room whenever the book calls.
manual_setup_checklist: Set website link to Dracula page.
Publish only the approved first post manually.

platforms.short_bio: A premium digital reading room beginning with Dracula by Bram Stoker.
platforms.long_about_description: The Earnalism is a premium digital reading room for timeless books. The controlled launch begins with Dracula by Bram Stoker. Bengali Gothic and other classics are moving through a rights-safe publication pipeline. We are building a calm, truthful, rights-aware reading experience for readers, students, and institutions.
